subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him. His are might and power and majesty; His are strength and grandeur [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو له العزه و القدره و الجلال و له القوه و العظمه و
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
